---
title: ""
author:
  - "Aryaman Dhindsa"
  - "Joshua Bannon"
  - "Smit Tambat"
  - "Chunjian Zhang"
course: "ETC5513"
unit: "Collaborative and Reproducible Practices"
semester: "Semester 1, 2026"
date: "27 May 2026"
format: html
self-contained: TRUE
bibliography: reference.bib
---

## Executive Summary

## Introduction

## Methodology

## Result

## Conclusion and Recommendations
